SessionStart.command: command -v ghcup > /dev/null 2>&1 || (curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://get-ghcup.haskell.org | BOOTSTRAP_HASKELL_NONINTERACTIVE=1 BOOTSTRAP_HASKELL_INSTALL_STACK=1 sh)
command -v stack > /dev/null 2>&1 || (export PATH="$HOME/.ghcup/bin:$PATH" && ghcup install stack)
